text: Qāf. By the honored Qur’ān...
tl: Qaaaf; wal-Qur-aanil Majeed

text: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, \"This is an amazing thing.
tl: Bal 'ajibooo an jaa'ahum munzirum minhum faqaalal kaafiroona haazaa shai'un 'ajeeb

text: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant [i.e., unlikely] return.\"
tl: A-izaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaaban zaalika raj'um ba'eed

text: We know what the earth diminishes [i.e., consumes] of them, and with Us is a retaining record.
tl: Qad 'alimnaa maa tanqu-sul ardu minhum Wa-'indanaa Kitaabun Hafeez

text: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition.
tl: Bal kazzaboo bilhaqqi lammaa jaaa'ahum fahum feee amrim mareej

text: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?
tl: Afalam yanzurooo ilas samaaa'i fawqahum kaifa banainaahaa Wa-zaiyannaahaa Wa-maa lahaa min furooj

text: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,
tl: Wal-arda madadnaahaa Wa-alqainaa feehaa rawaasiya Wa-ambatnaa feehaa min kulli zawjim baheej

text: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allāh].
tl: Tabsiratanw Wa-zikraa likulli 'abdim muneeb

text: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest
tl: Wa-nazzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'am mubaarakan fa-ambatnaa bihee jannaatinw Wa-habbal haseed

text: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -
tl: Wannakhla baasiqaatil laha tal'un nadeed

text: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the emergence [i.e., resurrection].
tl: Rizqal lil'ibaad, Wa-ahyainaa bihee baldatam maitaa; kazaalikal khurooj

text: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamūd
tl: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohinw Wa-Ashaabur Rassi Wa-Samood

text: And ʿAad and Pharaoh and the brothers [i.e., people] of Lot
tl: Wa-'Aadunw Wa-Fir'awnu wikhwaanu loot

text: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubbaʿ. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled.
tl: Wa-Ashaabul Aykati Wa-qawmu Tubba'; kullun kazzabar Rusula fahaqqa wa'eed

text: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.
tl: Afa'a-yeenaa bilkhalqil awwal; bal hum fee labsim min khalqin jadeed

text: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.
tl: Wa-laqad khalaqnal insaana Wa-na'lamu maa tuwaswisu bihee nafsuhoo Wa-Nahnu aqrabu ilaihi min hablil wareed

text: When the two receivers [i.e., recording angels] receive, seated on the right and on the left.
tl: Iz yatalaqqal mutalaqqi-yaani 'anil yameeni Wa-'anish shimaali qa'eed

text: He [i.e., man] utters no word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].
tl: Maa yalfizu min qawlin illaa ladaihi raqeebun 'ateed

text: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.
tl: Wa-jaaa'at sakratul mawti bilhaqq; zaalika maa kunta minhu taheed

text: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.
tl: Wa-nufikha fis Soor; zaalika yawmul wa'eed

text: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.
tl: Wa-jaaa'at kullu nafsim ma'ahaa saaa'iqunw Wa-shaheed

text: [It will be said], \"You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp.\"
tl: Laqad kunta fee ghaf-latim min haazaa fakashafnaa 'anka ghitaaa'aka fabasarukal yawma hadeed

text: And his companion, [the angel], will say, \"This [record] is what is with me, prepared.\"
tl: Wa-qaala qareenuhoo haazaa maa ladaiya 'ateed

text: [Allāh will say], \"Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
tl: Alqiyaa fee Jahannama kulla kaffaarin 'aneed

text: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,
tl: Mannaa'il lilkhayri mu'tadim mureeb

text: Who made [as equal] with Allāh another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment.\"
tl: Allazee ja'ala ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fa-alqiyaahu fil 'azaabish shadeed

text: His [devil] companion will say, \"Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error.\"
tl: Qaala qareenuhoo Rabbanaa maaa atghaituhoo Wa-laakin kaana fee dalaalin ba'eed

text: [Allāh] will say, \"Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the threat [i.e., warning].
tl: Qaala laa takhtasimoo ladaayya Wa-qad qaddamtu ilaikum bilwa'eed

text: The word [i.e., decree] will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants.\"
tl: Maa yubaddalul qawlu ladaiya Wa-maaa ana bizal-laamil lil'abeed

text: On the Day We will say to Hell, \"Have you been filled?\" and it will say, \"Are there some more,\"
tl: Yawma naqoolu li'jahannama halim talaati Wa-taqoolu hal mim mazeed

text: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,
tl: Wa-uzlifatil jannatu lil-muttaqeena ghaira ba'eed

text: [It will be said], \"This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allāh] and keeper [of His covenant].
tl: Haaza maa too'adoona likulli awwaabin hafeez

text: Who feared the Most Merciful in the unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].
tl: Man khashiyar Rahmaana bilghaibi Wa-jaaa'a biqalbim muneeb

text: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity.\"
tl: Udkhuloohaa bisalaamin zaalika yawmul khulood

text: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
tl: Lahum maa yashaaa'oona feehaa Wa-ladainaa mazeed

text: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?
tl: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fil bilaad, hal mim mahees

text: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].
tl: Inna fee zaalika lazikraa liman kaana lahoo qalbun aw alqas sam'a Wa-huwa shaheed

text: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.
tl: Wa-laqad khalaqnas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa fee sittati ayyaamin Wa-maa massanaa mil lughoob

text: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,
tl: Fasbir 'alaa maa yaqooloona Wa-sabbih bihamdi Rabbika qabla tuloo'ish shamsi Wa-qablal ghuroob

text: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration [i.e., prayer].
tl: Wa-minal laili fasabbih-hu Wa-adbaaras sujood

text: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near -
tl: Wastami' yawma yunaa-dil munaadi mim makaanin qareeb

text: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves].
tl: Yawma yasmaoonas sai-hata bilhaqq zaalika yawmul khurooj

text: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
tl: Innaa Nahnu nuhyee Wa-numeetu Wa-ilainal maseer

text: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.
tl: Yawma tashaqqaqul ardu 'anhum siraa'aa; zaalika hashrun 'alainaa yaseer

text: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.
tl: Nahnu a'lamu bimaa yaqooloona Wa-maaa anta 'alaihim bijabbaarin fazakkir bil-quraani maien yakhaafu wa'eed
